# Farid Bouchdak

> PPP advisor for governments and digital founder. I build infrastructure — physical and digital.

Farid Bouchdak is a public-private partnership (PPP) advisor with experience across 9 countries and 35 procurement processes, and a digital founder running multiple internet projects in parallel. His central thesis: the logic of building physical infrastructure and digital products is identical — both are about creating systems that sustain themselves.

## About

- [Homepage (NL)](https://faridbouchdak.com/)
- [Homepage (EN)](https://faridbouchdak.com/en/)

## Projects

- [P3nomads](https://p3nomads.com) — PPP training platform, active
- [Afdeling ICT](https://afdeling-ict.nl) — IT advisory, rebranding
- [Ask Founders Anything](https://askfoundersanything.com) — in development
- [Le Goggles](https://legoggles.com) — in development
- [StickyNotes](https://stickynotes.club) — asset
- [Bouchdak.com](https://bouchdak.com) — redirects to faridbouchdak.com
